chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-5551 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For order on Misc. No.23722/2022 3. For hearing of main case 05.8.2025 None present for the petitioner -------------------------------- This is an old petition of 2022, which is over three years ago. On its inception i.e. 26.9.2022, which is over three years ago, none was present for the petitioner without intimation despite it being kept aside. Despite lapse of three years, the petitioner has made no efforts to have this petition fixed for hearing. Today, once again none present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
